# Project Slick (Hyperliquid Edition)
Autonomous A2A trading swarm for geopolitical alpha.

## Agents
- **Sentinel**: Geopolitical news scraper (multimodal artifacts).
- **Quant**: Hyperliquid L1 order book & structural analyst.
- **Orchestrator**: Gemini 3.1 Pro powered execution head.

## Entry Points
- **Dashboard**: https://slicktrader.xyz/dashboard
- **Backend API**: http://localhost:8000 (Internal)
- **Quant Data**: `/quant/liquidity` (OHLC, BB, Live Stats)
- **Community**: https://AlgoTradersClub.com
- **License**: MIT (Algo Traders Club LLC)
- **On-Chain Proof**: https://app.hyperliquid.xyz/tradeHistory/0x517CFeae25Ac7D49aD70037b253B9f24C7E556Cf
